title: Henriettea squamata
taxonomy: Henriettea squamata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This family is commonly known as the "melastome" or "memecyclid" family. Melastomataceae is an order of flowering plants that is native to various parts of the world, including tropical and subtropical regions. The family is known for its diverse range of species, many of which are found in South America. Henriettea squamata is a member of this diverse and widespread family of flowering plants.
